items.title: Haaland scores as Norway knock out Ivory Coast
items.summary: Erling Haaland sent Norway into a round-of-16 clash with Brazil by scoring an 86th-minute winner against Ivory Coast in Dallas.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Shelton stunned in 1st-round Wimbledon loss
items.summary: Fourth-seeded Ben Shelton is out after the 1st-round at Wimbledon, falling to Finland's Otto Virtanen 6-4, 6-7 (8), 6-2, 7-6 (9).
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Why Zlatan Ibrahimović Told Erling Haaland To 'Never' Cut His Hair
items.summary: Zlatan Ibrahimović has taken credit for Norway star Erling Haaland's ponytail — and his "strength."
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
